name: AzureCredential
description: Azure account credential supporting inline (service principal), runner (Managed Identity), and browser OAuth (Entra ID) authentication modes.

fields.name: auth_mode
fields.description: Authentication mode. inline: service principal credentials in spec; runner: Managed Identity or environment credentials; browser_oauth: delegated tokens via Microsoft Entra ID consent flow.

fields.name: runner
fields.description: Slug of a RunnerRegistration in the same organization. Required when auth_mode=runner.

fields.name: client_id
fields.description: Azure Service Principal Client ID (Application ID). Required when auth_mode=inline.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.description: Azure Service Principal Client Secret. Required when auth_mode=inline.

fields.name: tenant_id
fields.description: Azure Active Directory Tenant ID. Required in all auth modes.

fields.name: subscription_id
fields.description: Azure Subscription ID. Required in all auth modes.

fields.name: oauth_user_email
fields.description: Email of the user who authorized via browser OAuth. Display-only, populated from Entra ID token claims.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.description: Microsoft Entra ID OAuth refresh token for browser_oauth mode. Required when auth_mode=browser_oauth.
